name: Nolan Watson
background: Mr. Watson is the President and CEO of Sandstorm. He was the first employee of Silver Wheaton Corp. (now Wheaton Precious Metals Corp.) where he served as CFO. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (BC), a Chartered Financial Analyst charterholder, and holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree.

companies.name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
companies.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director
